ThingDef.label: vertibird engine
ThingDef.description: A powerful turbine engine designed specifically for VTOL aircraft. This pre-war engine combines thrust vectoring with vertical take-off capabilities, allowing vertibirds to hover and maneuver with precision. Due to its atmospheric-only design, it cannot reach orbital altitudes like spacer shuttle engines.\n\nThese engines are extremely rare and valuable, typically salvaged from crashed vertibirds or obtained through military contacts.
